hero.title: Let us know you first, then we'll tailor zenstory for you
hero.subtitle: Pick your creator persona and goals. We'll personalize templates, workflows, and key entry points accordingly.
hero.restore: Your previous persona setup is loaded. You can update it anytime.

persona.title: Which type of creator are you?
persona.subtitle: Choose up to 3 options so we can match your stage with the right experience.
persona.limitReached: You can select up to 3 personas. Deselect one to continue.

explorer.title: Beginner Explorer
explorer.desc: You're just starting out and need guided steps, templates, and AI support to finish your first complete work.

serial.title: Serial Growth Writer
serial.desc: You care about consistent updates and want better planning, reminders, and workflow support for sustained output.

professional.title: Professional Creator
professional.desc: You already have experience and care most about efficiency, quality, and monetization-oriented creation.

fanfic.title: Fanfic / Hobby Creator
fanfic.desc: You focus on character dynamics and world-building, and want to turn ideas into polished drafts quickly.

studio.title: IP / Studio Team
studio.desc: You create with others and need clear responsibilities, transparent progress, and shared resource management.

goal.title: What do you want most right now?
goal.subtitle: Multi-select is supported. We'll prioritize features based on your focus.

experience.title: Your writing experience
experience.subtitle: We'll adjust guidance depth and complexity based on your level.

beginner.title: 0-3 months
beginner.desc: More guided steps, examples, and default templates.

intermediate.title: 3 months - 2 years
intermediate.desc: Balanced setup with flexibility plus practical advanced hints.

advanced.title: 2+ years
advanced.desc: High-efficiency workflow with less interruption and more high-value tools.

preview.title: Personalized preview
preview.subtitle: After submission, we’ll tune homepage structure, recommendations, and writing reminders for you.
preview.empty: Select at least one persona to preview your personalized setup.

items.explorer: Clear next-step prompts and starter templates
items.serial: Stronger support for daily/weekly writing cadence
items.professional: Tools prioritized for efficiency and commercialization
items.fanfic: Better support for character consistency and world settings
items.monetize: Growth and monetization capabilities surfaced earlier
items.quality: More focused guidance on plot, character, and prose quality

level.beginner: Beginner mode reduces learning overhead and helps you start fast
level.intermediate: Balanced guidance optimized for both speed and quality
level.advanced: Fewer basics, more high-value decision support

preview.note: Note: In this Beta stage, persona data is stored locally on this device and will later support cross-device sync.
